steps.title: Subtract adult-ticket revenue
steps.content:
The $260$ adult tickets brought in:
$$260(12)=3{,}120$$
Subtract from total revenue:
$$5{,}640-3{,}120=2{,}520$$

steps.title: Divide by the child price
steps.content:
Each child ticket costs $6$, so divide the remaining revenue by $6$:
$$\frac{2{,}520}{6}=420$$
The answer is 420.
